title: Edit Config In Place With sed
description:
## Flip a Setting Without an Editor

A config file **`/root/app.conf`** contains:

```
host=localhost
port=8080
debug=true
```

**Your task:** using **`sed -i`** (in-place), change the line **`debug=true`** to **`debug=false`** — without touching the other lines.

> 💡 Anchor the substitution to the start of the line (`^debug=`) so you only match the intended key.

hints.title: In-place substitution
hints.body: sed -i edits the file in place; the s/// command substitutes. Anchor with ^ to avoid matching elsewhere.

validation.description: Checks that debug is now false and the port line is untouched.
